case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FEDERICO ANTONIO PENA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUN-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, FEDERICO ANTONIO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.20 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, FEDERICO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT OF THE PARTIES. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN, INC., AND DEFENDANT FEDERICO ANTONIO PENA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
